s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL (for Manual Seat)

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the seat track cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the inner seat track bracket cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Manual Seat)

s2.ptxt: Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide handle.
Remove the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket.
Move the front seat assembly to the center position and adjust the seatback to the vertical position by operating the slide and reclining adjuster release handle.
Disconnect the connectors and clamp.
Remove the front seat assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the position farthest forward.
Using a screwdriver, detach the 4 claws and remove the seat track cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the 4 claws and remove the inner seat track bracket cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY LH (for Power Seat)

s2.ptxt: Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the rearmost position.
Remove the 2 bolts on the front seat track bracket.
Operate the power seat switch knob and move the seat to the position farthest forward.
Remove the 2 bolts on the rear seat track bracket.
Disconnect the cable from the negative (-) battery terminal.

atten2.ptxt: Wait at least 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable from the negative (-) battery terminal to prevent the airbag and seat belt pretensioner from deploying (See page ).

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connectors under the seat. Then remove the front seat assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Manual Seat)
REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Manual Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY (for Power Seat)
REMOVE SEAT TRACK COVER RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER LH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT SEAT ASSEMBLY RH (for Power Seat)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT CUSHION ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Detach the 2 front hooks of the seat cushion from the vehicle body.

atten3.ptxt: Follow the instructions below carefully as the cushion frame can be deformed easily.

s3.ptxt: Choose a hook to detach first. Place your hands near the hook as shown in the illustration. Then lift the seat cushion to detach the hook.
Repeat the step above for the other hook.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear seat cushion assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
REMOVE REAR CENTER SEAT HEADREST ASSEMBLY
REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Fixed Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 rear seat belts from the 3 rear seat shoulder belt guides.
Remove the 4 bolts and rear seat back assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and separate type rear seat back assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and separate type rear seat back assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and rear side seat back assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SIDE SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Fold Down Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR SEAT BACK COVER (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, detach the claws and remove the 2 rear seat back covers.

item.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.
Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Separate the 2 rear seat belts.
Disengage the 3 clamps and then separate the cover.
Remove the 2 bolts and 2 nuts and separate type rear seat back assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SEPARATE TYPE REAR SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Separate the rear seat belt.
Disengage the 3 clamps and then separate the cover.
Remove the 2 bolts and 2 nuts and separate type rear seat back assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CENTER SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and center seat back assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
REMOVE REAR DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH
REMOVE RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY LH (for Reclining Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt.
Disengage the 2 clips and the claw and then separate the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.
Separate the rear seat reclining control cable and remove the reclining remote control lever sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RECLINING REMOTE CONTROL LEVER SUB-ASSEMBLY RH (for Reclining Seat Type)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INSIDE HANDLE BEZEL PLUG LH

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 3 claws and remove the rear door inside handle bezel plug.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE DOOR ASSIST GRIP COVER LH

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with the tip wrapped with protective tape, disengage the 6 claws and remove the door assist grip cover.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR TRIM BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 3 screws.
Using a clip remover, disengage the 7 clips.
Raise the rear door trim board to disengage the 4 claws and remove the rear door trim board together with the rear door inner glass weatherstrip.
Disconnect the connector.
Disengage the 2 claws and disconnect the rear door inside handle sub-assembly.
Disengage the clip as shown in the illustration and remove the No. 1 door scuff plate clamp from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DOOR INNER GLASS WEATHERSTRIP LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 clips as shown in the illustration and remove the rear door inner glass weatherstrip from the rear door trim board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 7 claws and 3 clips, and remove the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP LH
REMOVE LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER (for LH Side)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and remove the lap belt outer anchor cover.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and disconnect the floor end of the front seat outer belt assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and remove the lower center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt.
Disengage the clip and remove the upper center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP RH
REMOVE LAP BELT OUTER ANCHOR COVER (for RH Side)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT FRONT SEAT OUTER BELT ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE UPPER CENTER PILLAR GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 clips and 2 claws, and remove the roof side inner garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF SIDE INNER GARNISH RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT PILLAR GARNISH LH

s2.ptxt: Pull the upper part of the garnish toward the inside of the cabin and disengage the 2 clips.
Cut off the clip <A>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front pillar garnish LH.
Remove the clip <A> from the vehicle body.
Protect the curtain shield airbag assembly.

s3.ptxt: Cover the airbag with a 700 mm (27.56 in.) x 120 mm (4.72 in.) cloth or piece of nylon and fix the ends of the cover with tape, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Cover the curtain shield airbag with a protective cover as soon as the front pillar garnish is removed.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT PILLAR GARNISH RH

s2.ptxt: Pull the upper part of the garnish toward the inside of the cabin and disengage the 2 clips.
Cut off the clip <A>.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the front pillar garnish RH.
Remove the clip <A> from the vehicle body.
Protect the curtain shield airbag assembly.

s3.ptxt: Cover the airbag with a 700 mm (27.56 in.) x 120 mm (4.72 in.) cloth or piece of nylon and fix the ends of the cover with tape, as shown in the illustration.

atten3.ptxt: Cover the curtain shield airbag with a protective cover as soon as the front pillar garnish is removed.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF CONSOLE BOX ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a moulding remover, disengage the 2 clips and 2 claws.
Disconnect the connectors and remove the roof console box assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VISOR ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Using a moulding remover, disengage the 4 claws and remove the visor bracket cover.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the visor assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VISOR ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VISOR HOLDER

s2.ptxt: Turn the visor holder approximately 45° and pull it out as shown in the illustration.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the visor holder.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT ASSIST GRIP SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 6 claws and remove the 2 assist grip covers.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 clips and remove the front assist grip sub-assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR ASSIST GRIP SUB-ASSEMBLY

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the rear side and the front side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 ROOM LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws and remove the lens cover.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws <A> as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws <B> and remove the No. 1 room light assembly.
Disconnect the room light connector.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SPOT LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws labeled A and 2 claws labeled B from the vehicle body.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 2 claws labeled C and remove the spot light assembly from the headlining.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, disengage the 4 claws.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Pull the light bulb holder in the direction indicated by the arrow in the illustration to detach the claw. Then remove the spot light assembly from the light bulb holder.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SUN ROOF OPENING TRIM MOULDING (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the sun roof opening trim moulding.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE SUNSHADE TRIM HOLDER (w/ Rear Sunshade)

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, turn the pin of each sunshade trim holder 90°.
Disengage the 2 claws and remove the sunshade trim holder.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the No. 1 roof wire connector and disengage each clamp from the front pillar LH.
Remove the bolt and disconnect the radio setting condenser from the front pillar RH.
Disconnect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and disengage each clamp from the front pillar RH.
Disconnect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and disengage the clamp from the rear pillar RH.
Disengage the 4 clips.
Remove the roof headlining assembly from the vehicle through the rear left door.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF HEADLINING ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the No. 1 roof wire connector and disengage each clamp from the front pillar LH.
Remove the bolt and disconnect the radio setting condenser from the front pillar RH.
Disconnect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and disengage each clamp from the front pillar RH.
Disconnect the antenna cord sub-assembly connector and disengage the clamp from the rear pillar RH.
Disconnect the sliding roof drive gear connector.
Disengage the hook, 4 clips, and 2 fasteners.
Remove the roof headlining assembly from the vehicle through the rear left door.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE RADIO SETTING CONDENSER

s2.ptxt: Remove the rivet and radio setting condenser.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER LH (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 2 rear side rail spacer LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER RH (w/o Sliding Roof)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 3 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER LH (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 3 rear side rail spacer LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 3 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER RH (w/o Sliding Roof)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF SIDE RAIL SILENCER PAD LH (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the roof side rail silencer pad LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE ROOF SIDE RAIL SILENCER PAD RH (w/o Sliding Roof)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 ROOF SILENCER PAD (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 2 roof silencer pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 4 ROOF SILENCER PAD (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 5 No. 4 roof silencer pads.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER LH (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 2 rear side rail spacer LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 REAR SIDE RAIL SPACER RH (w/ Sliding Roof)

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FASTENER HOOK (w/ Sliding Roof)
REMOVE ANTENNA CORD SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Peel the strips of the tape used to secure the antenna cord only to the extent that allows removal of the antenna cord.

atten4.ptxt: Tape is not available as a supply part. Try to leave as much tape as possible on the roof headlining so that the tape can be reused.

s2.ptxt: Remove the antenna cord from the roof headlining.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE VANITY LIGHT ASSEMBLY (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws <A> and separate the bulb holder from the vanity light assembly as shown in the illustration.
Disengage the claw <B> and remove the vanity light assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure to remove the light on the other side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 ROOF WIRE (w/o Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Remove the adhesive tape from the roof headlining assembly.
Remove the No. 1 roof wire from the roof headlining assembly.
Remove the double-sided tape from the roof headlining assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 ROOF WIRE (w/ Sliding Roof)

s2.ptxt: Turn the visor connectors clockwise approximately 90° and separate the connectors from the roof headlining assembly.
Remove the adhesive tape from the roof headlining assembly.
Remove the No. 1 roof wire from the roof headlining assembly.
Remove the double-sided tape from the roof headlining assembly.
